page.title: EVE Galore
page.t: Anchor a capital ship as a fleet command point. Cargo drones automatically collect nearby drops. Subordinate miners deliver here, subordinate traders haul cargo to sell.
Mine resources near a Command Ship and deliver cargo via direct transfer or jetcan drop. Requires a commander with the Command Ship or ORE Command order active.
Service a Command Ship by hauling cargo to sell. Evaluates commander's inventory, loads the best trade, sells at market or a designated station, then returns.

Activate Industrial Core mode. Locks the ship in place, enables ore compression, and coordinates subordinate miners and traders. Requires ORE Command software. (Compression requires compressed ore wares to be defined.)
